---
title: "Martin Petr"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.png
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/bodkan
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:contact@bodkan.net"
    - text: Mastodon
      url: https://fosstodon.org/@bodkan
    - text: Twitter
      url: https://twitter.com/bodkan_net
---

I am a researcher and programmer at the University of Copenhagen, Denmark.

I work on methods for spatial inference and simulation in genetics and ecology, with the aim to gain new insights into the evolutionary histories of species across space and time.

I also enjoy teaching and mentoring. An important focus of my work is on building intuitive interfaces to complex methods useful for novice and expert users alike.

<a rel="me" href="https://fosstodon.org/@bodkan"></a>
